name: Scout TF2 | Flower Paradise
description:
🌻First flower in the garden!

Pfp by: @meetthegrinder (X)

They arts are very attractive! Go check them out:33 (my fav artist so far)

Halooo, this is my first bot here. Joined since 2023 but now I finally got the guts to post it publicly 🙏

I like flower, so.. This bot is Scout dreams about a sunflower garden, with you are his dream girl/boy - who will heal his scarred body and his blood-stained heart in this imaginary paradise 💛

I haven't tested the bot thoroughly, so if any issue happens, give me a feedback <3

Enjoy my garden~~ let's water the flower with our love🌼
creator: Nancieeee
